name: The Futures of You and Me
overview: Webtoon producer Seo Mi-rae's ordinary life is disrupted by workplace stress — and by the enchanting opportunity to test a new virtual dating service.

name: Cliche or Classic
overview: Mi-rae's first virtual date sweeps her off her feet and into a high-society fantasy — and helps to wage a war when she is pitted against Park Kyeong-nam.

name: First Love 101
overview: Mi-rae's second date unfolds on a college campus, but her match plays hard to get while memories of her first love keep coming back.

name: No Risk, High Return
overview: After her free trial abruptly ends, Mi-rae pays the high price to make the most of virtual dating — an investment with sweet returns and zero risk.

name: The Caveats of Perfection
overview: Mi-rae reconnects with someone from her past and their date feels new. A Naemo team workshop sparks an awkward confession.

name: The Hybrid Man
overview: Mi-rae's dream date with the next match leaves her unimpressed — but she returns to the service after hearing some sobering advice.

name: The Algorithm of Feelings
overview: While the virtual and real worlds begin to blend for Mi-rae, she is tasked to create a game plan for Yun Song — leading to a surprise group gathering.

name: The Odd or Even Game
overview: As a real-life connection challenges Mi-rae's devotion to virtual dating, her defenses begin to crumble and the fear of being alone resurfaces.

name: Like or Love
overview: Under pressure from Naemo, Author Yun scrambles for the top spot as a scandal brews. Meanwhile, Kyeong-nam comes face-to-face with Mi-rae's secret.

name: An Utterly Normal Future
overview: After misunderstandings and mixed messages, Mi-rae turns to the virtual world for advice. Can she find answers and a new way to open her heart?
